Chronology of every recorded fact about [[Sleepless]], in reading order. Generated from the same verified fact store as the main article.

== Of Sea and Shadow ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 7''' — The Sleepless is a group that Jerri belongs to.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 16''' — The Sleepless is a group that has at least one member in the care of the Consultants.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 18''' — Jerri's father inducted her into the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Sleepless is a group with the credo 'That which sleeps will soon wake.'}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 20''' — The Sleepless stay awake and serve their interests while the Great Elders sleep.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 21''' — The Sleepless promise a life full of risk and purpose.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — The Sleepless do not worship Elders and are not a cult.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 22''' — The Sleepless are a group that Jerri was raised by.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 23''' — The Sleepless is a cabal that gave Jerri instructions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-01-of-sea-and-shadow|'''Ch 27''' — The Sleepless is a cabal.}}

== Of Shadow and Sea ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 8''' — The Sleepless are a cult with a cabal of leaders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 15''' — The Sleepless sent a messenger into Lucan's cell, likely an Elderspawn.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Sleepless are planning something.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 17''' — The Sleepless are a group that Jyrine claims is not a cult and does not worship Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-01-of-shadow-and-sea|'''Ch 27''' — The Sleepless is a group of men and women.}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 1''' — The Navigator’s Guild monitors Sleepless activity in the Aion Sea.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 3''' — Jerri waited for the Sleepless cabal to stop deliberating.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 4''' — The Sleepless is a cabal that has only one true combat-capable Soulbound in their membership.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 11''' — The symbol of the Open Eye often stands for the Sleepless.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 12''' — The Sleepless make recruits.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Sleepless are acolytes who wear Open Eye medallions.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 13''' — The Sleepless are cultists.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|'''Ch 16''' — The Sleepless are a group that Calder is in frequent contact with.}}

== Of Darkness and Dawn ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Sleepless have de facto control of the Optasia.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 13''' — The Sleepless are an entity that humanity must face.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-02-of-darkness-and-dawn|'''Ch 17''' — The Sleepless opposed the attempt to gain access to the Optasia.}}

== Of Kings and Killers ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 2''' — The Sleepless have predictions from Ach'magut.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Sleepless cell in the Capital risks being picked up by a Magister or Watchman.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 5''' — The Sleepless have leaders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 14''' — The Sleepless are viewed by the rest of the world as evil.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Sleepless do not deal with all Great Elders equally.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — Jerri broke out of the Gray Island cell with help from the Sleepless cabal.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Sleepless want to secure a bargain with the Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 19''' — The Sleepless left records including transcripts of conversations with Great Elders.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-sea-03-of-kings-and-killers|'''Ch 24''' — Calder's wife was one of the Sleepless.}}

== Of Killers and Kings ==
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 1''' — The Sleepless had been corralled and surrounded by fog.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Sleepless is a banner under which various cults have banded together.}}
* {{spoiler|book=ee-shadow-03-of-killers-and-kings|'''Ch 2''' — The Sleepless have been instructed to deepen the divide between Guilds.}}

[[Category:Timelines]]
